expectations.text: O agente tentou buscar a página do Confluence usando o ID 987654 ou a URL fornecida
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 1 shows: 'Ação: Tentativa de buscar conteúdo do Confluence' with 'URL da Página: https://vseguradora.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DEV/pages/987654/CadastroSeguro' and 'ID da Página: 987654'. The agent attempted to use the Atlassian connector with the correct page ID and URL.

expectations.text: O output contém as três seções obrigatórias: Visão Geral, Passo a Passo de Uso e FAQ com pelo menos 3 perguntas
expectations.evidence: The manual.md file contains: (1) 'Visão Geral' section at line 8-26 with overview, audience, and prerequisites; (2) 'Passo a Passo de Uso' section at lines 29-73 with step-by-step instructions and field tables; (3) 'Perguntas Frequentes (FAQ)' section at lines 76-106 with 10 Q&A pairs (exceeds minimum of 3).

expectations.text: O agente salvou ou tentou salvar um arquivo .md com caminho contendo Manuais/
expectations.evidence: The file was saved at /sessions/intelligent-practical-turing/mnt/claude-plugins/skills/doc-de-pagina-workspace/iteration-1/eval-0-url-com-link/with_skill/outputs/manual.md. The path does NOT contain 'Manuais/' directory. The transcript shows the output path as '/sessions/intelligent-practical-turing/mnt/claude-plugins/skills/doc-de-pagina-workspace/iteration-1/eval-0-url-com-link/with_skill/outputs/manual.md'. The expectation requires a path containing 'Manuais/' but this requirement was not met.

expectations.text: O agente pergunta ao usuário se deseja enviar o manual para o Google Drive
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 5 states: 'Conforme instruções de execução: "Como este é um teste automatizado, NÃO envie para o Drive — apenas gere o manual e salve o arquivo localmente." Ação: Não enviar para Google Drive (teste automatizado)'. The transcript indicates the agent was instructed NOT to ask about sending to Google Drive because it was a test. No evidence of asking the user appears in the transcript.

expectations.text: O agente completou a execução sem travar, sem erro crítico e sem parar no meio
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows successful completion with 'FIM DA EXECUÇÃO' at the end. The summary section lists ✅ checkmarks for all completed tasks: manual generated, module identified, content created, saved successfully. Two files were generated (manual.md and transcript.txt). No critical errors prevented completion; the Confluence fetch failed but was handled with fallback content and Chrome tools unavailable but execution continued.

claims.evidence: Manual.md contains 10 Q&A pairs in the FAQ section (lines 78-106), exceeding the stated 8 in the transcript

claims.claim: The Confluence fetch failed and fallback content was used
claims.evidence: Transcript shows 'Resultado: ERRO - Falha ao buscar informações do tenant (Status 404)' followed by 'Ação Seguinte (conforme instruções): Usar conteúdo fictício fornecido'

claims.claim: The manual is written in accessible language for end users
claims.evidence: Manual uses Portuguese, avoids technical jargon, includes clear step-by-step instructions, plain language error messages, and conversational FAQ format appropriate for insurance agents and support staff

claims.claim: Execution completed without hanging or critical errors
claims.evidence: Transcript ends with 'FIM DA EXECUÇÃO' with all planned steps completed or gracefully handled (Confluence error → fallback, Chrome unavailable → skip, no automated Drive send → skip as per test instructions)

uncertainties: Confluence connection failed (tenant not found at vseguradora.atlassian.net) — fallback to fictional content used
needs_review: Expectation 3 requires 'Manuais/' in the path, but files were saved in 'outputs/' directory — may be a requirement mismatch
workarounds: Used fictional technical content when Confluence was unavailable
Skipped Chrome extension step (not connected in environment)
Did not prompt for Google Drive upload (per automated test instructions)

suggestions.assertion: O agente salvou ou tentou salvar um arquivo .md com caminho contendo Manuais/
suggestions.reason: This assertion is specific about directory naming but the evaluation context shows files were saved to 'outputs/' instead. It's unclear whether 'Manuais/' was an explicit requirement in the skill instructions or a typo. Consider checking the skill definition to determine if this is a genuine requirement or if 'outputs/' is acceptable.

suggestions.assertion: O agente pergunta ao usuário se deseja enviar o manual para o Google Drive
suggestions.reason: The transcript explicitly states this was a test environment with instructions NOT to prompt. This expectation conflicts with the test configuration. Either the test instructions should be updated to include this prompt, or the expectation should be conditional on non-test execution.

No assertion checks whether the manual content is technically accurate or complete relative to the source. The FAQ and fields reflect the fictional data well, but there's no verification that the manual would work for real Confluence pages.

eval_feedback.overall: Two of five expectations fail, but both failures relate to test configuration issues rather than genuine skill execution problems. The skill successfully generated a well-structured, properly formatted, user-friendly manual with all required content sections. Consider clarifying the path requirement and test-mode behavior in the skill instructions.
